en: What's this? / What is this?
notes: シンプルだが最頻出の質問

en: What do you mean? / What's that supposed to mean?
notes: 後者はやや攻撃的に聞こえうるので注意

en: Why? / How come?
notes: "How come?" は "Why?" よりカジュアルで柔らかい

jp: どうしてそうなったの？
en: How did that happen?
notes: シンプルで自然

en: When? / When was that?
notes: "When was that?" のほうが会話的

en: Where? / Where was that?
notes: 同上

en: With who? / Who with?
notes: 文法的には "With whom?" だが口語では "With who?" が普通

en: Who said that? / Who told you that?
notes: "Who told you?" は情報源を聞くニュアンス

en: What were you doing? / What were you up to?
notes: "up to" を付けるとカジュアルになる

en: What are you doing right now? / What are you up to?
notes: "right now" で「今まさに」を強調

en: What do you think?
notes: 意見を求める最も基本的な表現

en: Which one do you think is better?
notes: "Which do you prefer?" は好み、"Which is better?" は客観的判断

en: What happened?
notes: 万能。状況を聞く第一声に

en: So what did you do? / Then what?
notes: "Then what?" は続きを促す

en: How far did you get? / How much have you done?
notes: "How far along are you?" も使える

jp: 何がそんなに面白いの？
en: What's so funny?
notes: ストレートな表現。笑っている人への定番

jp: 何でそんなに疲れてるの？
en: Why are you so tired?
notes: "You look exhausted." =「すごく疲れて見える」

en: What did you eat today? / What did you have?
notes: "have" は食事に使う。"What did you have for lunch?"

en: Have you decided? / Did you make up your mind?
notes: "make up your mind" =「決心する」

en: Is that true? / Is that for real?
notes: "for real" はカジュアル

en: What time are we going? / What time should we go?
notes: "we" を使うと一緒に行く前提になる

en: How long does it take? / How long will it take?
notes: 時間→ "How long?" 費用→ "How much?"

en: Which do you like better? / Which do you prefer?
notes: "prefer" はやや丁寧

en: What's your favorite? / What do you like the most?
notes: "What's your favorite X?" の形で覚えると便利

en: What are you torn about? / What can't you decide?
notes: "torn" =「引き裂かれて迷っている」

en: Is there anything you want? / Do you want anything?
notes: "anything" は疑問文・否定文で使う。"something" ではない

en: What are you doing this weekend? / Got any plans for the weekend?
notes: "Got any plans?" は頻出の聞き方

en: Are you free tomorrow?
notes: 誘いの前振りとして自然

en: Want to come? / Want to join?
notes: "You in?" はさらにカジュアル

jp: 何でそんなに急いでるの？
en: Why are you in such a rush? / What's the hurry?
notes: "What's the rush?" でも同じ

en: Where did you get that?
notes: "get" が自然。"buy" より広い意味（もらった場合も含む）

en: How was it? / What was it like?
notes: "What was it like?" は体験を詳しく聞く時

en: Who did you hear that from? / Who told you?
notes: 前置詞 "from" は文末に置くのが口語的

en: Is it too late? / Can we still make it?
notes: "make it" =「間に合う」。非常に便利

jp: 何か気になることある？
en: Is there anything on your mind? / Anything bothering you?
notes: "on your mind" =「心にかかっている」

en: Do you like that? / You're into that?
notes: "be into X" =「Xにハマっている」

en: How do you do it? / How does it work?
notes: 方法→ "How do you do it?" 仕組み→ "How does it work?"

en: What should we do first?
notes: "What's the priority?" はビジネス寄り

en: Are you leaving already? / You're heading out?
notes: "heading out" は「出発する」のカジュアルな表現
